Term Sheet for Series B Funding

1. **Company**: Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T09LL1234X)
2. **Investor**: Dr. Alex Tan
3. **Investment Amount**: SGD 5,000,000
4. **Shares Issued**: 500,000 Series B Preferred Shares
5. **Valuation**: Pre-money valuation of SGD 20,000,000
6. **Board Representation**: Investor entitled to appoint one board member.
7. **Contact Information**: +65 8123 4567, alex.tan@quantum.sg
8. **Legal Representative**: Mr. John Lim, NRIC S2345678B
9. **Closing Date**: No later than December 31, 2023
10. **SPA**: The Share Purchase Agreement ("SPA") will outline further terms.
11. **Project Status**: The current project status does not impact this term sheet.
12. **Obfuscated NRIC**: Refer to https://example.sg/investor/S2345678B for more details.

Please note, the project plan will not be evaluated within the scope of the SPA.
